content: The Prop Firm model allows traders to manage significant capital (up to $300k) allocated by a firm after passing an evaluation. Traders keep up to 90% of profits (Profit Split). It solves the under-capitalization problem for skilled traders.

In the crypto ecosystem, security is paramount. 'Not your keys, not your coins'. We recommend hardware wallets (Ledger) for long-term storage and PSAN-registered platforms for transactions to ensure regulatory compliance in Europe.

Professional trading requires professional tools. We partner with top-tier SaaS providers like TradingView to offer the best charting and analysis experience. Essential for passing Prop Firm challenges.

Nexus Global is a media agency connecting traders with the best infrastructure. We provide educational resources and direct access to trusted funding partners and security tools. We do not provide financial advice.

Trading involves significant risk. Most retail traders lose money. Never trade with money you cannot afford to lose. Nexus Global acts as a marketing intermediary and does not provide investment advice.
